what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG line icon showing a megaphone shape with three outward stroke marks on the right.
observations: The SVG uses a 24x24 viewBox with explicit 24 width and height.
Rendering is stroke-only with fill set to none and stroke set to currentColor.
Stroke width is 1.5 with round line caps and round joins.
The first path draws the megaphone body.
The second path draws three separate outward marks to the right of the megaphone.
standouts: The icon is compact, consisting of two path elements.
The use of currentColor makes the icon inherit color from its rendering context.
conventions: Follows common line-icon conventions: 24px canvas, no fill, currentColor stroke, rounded caps, and rounded joins.
Keeps all geometry inline as SVG path data.
Does not include title, desc, role, or aria attributes inside the SVG.
concerns: No intrinsic accessibility metadata is present in the SVG file.
The path data is terse and has no named substructure for individual visual parts.
notes: A reusable stroke-based megaphone icon asset with outward emphasis marks.
questions: Are the outward strokes intended to communicate a link, broadcast, sharing, or notification state?
Is accessibility labeling expected to be supplied by the consuming component?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a megaphone-link icon, and the file itself draws a megaphone with outward marks; the exact link meaning is not explicit in the SVG markup alone.
intention_signals: It seems intended as a reusable 24px icon for announcement or broadcast-related UI, with color inherited from the surrounding interface.
novelty: The distinct element is the pairing of a megaphone body with three separate outward marks rather than a plain megaphone silhouette.
contribution: Contributes a compact, color-inheriting announcement-style SVG glyph that a fused system could retain as a reusable icon asset for broadcast, notification, or callout contexts.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 stroke-only currentColor SVG icon depicting a megaphone with three outward emphasis marks.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for providing a reusable theme-adaptive megaphone-style icon in an SVG asset set.
